User.title: User Profile
User.description: Represents a registered user profile, settings, and saved astrology profiles.

uid.description: The unique identifier for the user matching their Firebase Auth UID.

name.description: The full display name of the user.

email.description: The verified email address of the user.

phoneNumber.description: Optional contact number retrieved from auth or Google People API.

photoURL.description: The profile photo URL of the user.

createdDate.description: ISO timestamp representing the date of creation.

lastLogin.description: ISO timestamp of the user's last login session.

/users/{userId}.description: User document storing demographic data, preferences, and historical charts.
